abstract: End-to-end Figma-to-production pipeline using Figma MCP server tools. Extract design context from Figma URL (fileKey + nodeId), extract design variables/tokens, match components via Code Connect mappings, and generate stack-specific production code. Supports React+Tailwind, Astro+Tailwind, Next.js, and Vue. Transforms Figma reference code into framework conventions with design tokens applied.
